name: Bethany Community School
description: Bethany Community School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerfield, NC. There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Dalton McMichael High School
description: Come play pickleball at Dalton McMichael High School in Mayodan, NC! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Jaycee Park
description: 2 courts presently being added to bring the total to 4. Completion first half 2025.

name: Lifestyle Fitness and Tennis Center
description: Lifestyle Fitness and Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Mayodan, NC. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, and trainers or lessons.
open_play_schedule: In addition to Open Play, court reservations can be made by contacting Lifestyle Fitness and Tennis Center @ 336-916-0028.

name: Madison-Mayodan Senior Center
description: Madison-Mayodan Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mayodan, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Mill Avenue Recreation Center
description: Mill Avenue Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eden, NC. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Reidsville Senior Citizens Center
description: Reidsville Senior Citizens Center is a place to play pickleball in Reidsville, NC. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.
